metadata.publisher: Uganda Printing and Publishing Corporation (UPPC), Entebbe
metadata.source_authority: Parliament of the Republic of Uganda
metadata.source_note: Local Governments (Amendment) (No. 2) Act, 2008 (Act 8 of 2008 on the running heads) from the Parliament of Uganda CMIS repository (scanned print; fresh OCR at 300 dpi, single-block capture of the operative pages). Inserts the local service tax: the Fifth Schedule regulations with the salaried-employee graduated table (ten bands by monthly income, 5,000 to 100,000 shillings per year) and the self-employed class tables. In force from FY2008/09 and unchanged through FY2025/26 for the employee bands UGAMOD implements.
metadata.title: Local Governments (Amendment) (No. 2) Act, 2008 (Act 8 of 2008) — local service tax inserted (Fifth Schedule)
